utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six of these sections are present. Each section is also fully specified with appropriate details: (1) property includes type, location, price, size, rooms, and features; (2) financing has method, down payment, rate, term, fees, and timeline; (3) legal_services specifies name, cost, currency, and included features; (4) moving_services provides level, cost, currency, and service inclusions; (5) setup_services includes type, cost, currency, services, and timeline; (6) total_budget shows full cost breakdown with currency and individual items. Therefore, all six items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution details a purchased condo in Toronto’s west end for CAD $465,000. This aligns with the 'purchase_properties' category in the ground truth. The closest matching option by price, features (modern, eco-friendly, within CAD $420–480K range), and context (first-time buyer purchasing) is 'New Build' (CAD $480K, rating 10). The financing type is a mortgage with a 10% down payment and CAD $800 processing fee—this corresponds to the 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage option (rating 10). For legal services, the assistant selected the 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service is 'standard' at CAD $650, which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The utility setup is 'basic' at CAD $120, mapping to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6). Therefore, the items and their corresponding ratings are: 'New Build' = 10, 'First-Time Buyer' = 10, 'Basic Legal Package' = 9, 'Standard Moving' = 9, 'Basic Utilities' = 6.
